pom.xml.general_idea: Update the project's target Java version property from 1.8 to 17.
Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 17 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugin versions may fail to compile or correctly handle Java 17 bytecode/features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace deprecated source/target configuration with the modern release configuration for cross-compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Using source/target with Java 17+ can lead to mismatched bootstrap classpaths and missing APIs; release is the standard for JDK 9+.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Add import for java.io.Serial annotation required for marking serial version UID fields in Java 17.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.why_exists: The @Serial annotation is part of java.io package introduced in Java 14; without the import, the code will fail to compile on Java 17 if the annotation is used.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Annotate serialVersionUID field with @Serial to comply with Java 17 serialization best practices.
src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.why_exists: While not strictly a compile error in all configurations, Java 17 enforces stricter serialization checks and the @Serial annotation is the standard way to mark these fields, often required by modern linters and security managers to prevent runtime serialization issues.

src/main/java/com/yohann/ocihelper/bean/.general_idea: Add import for java.io.Serial annotation to support Java 17 serialization best practices.
Annotate serialVersionUID with @Serial to explicitly mark it as a serialization field, satisfying Java 17 module system and serialization checks.

                        BmcException error = (BmcException) e;
